title: Insulated Lunch Bag Nylon Preppy Boys Girls Lunch Box Large Insulated Lunch Bag Reusable Lunch Tote Bag with Smiley Preppy LunchBag for Girls School Travel Picnic Adjustable (Purple)
features: UNIQUE DESIGN: This cute lunch bag is made of high-quality and soft nylon material, featuring professionally sewn chenille letter patches and fun patterns to brighten up your day. It comes with a sturdy handle and a detachable adjustable shoulder strap, offering you various ways to carry it.

LARGE CAPACITY: The girls lunch box bag measures approximately 9.3"x 9.3"x 4.5" (23.5cm L x 23.5cm H x 11.5cm W), with a capacity of 7.2L, big enough to pack all the food and snacks you need for the day. The inside is equipped with compartment pockets, which can easily hold items such as tableware, napkins, ice packs, etc.

Convenient Zipper Closure: Equipped with smooth gold dual zippers. The double zipper closure ensures the safety of your items while traveling. The secure, tear-resistant design makes it durable for everyday use. The insulated interior helps maintain the freshness of your food. Suitable for individuals over 3 years old.

INSULATED LUNCH BAGS: Cooler bag insulated inner layer is made of PEVA to prevent heat loss or gain, the outer layer is made of high-quality oxford canvas so you can store and preserve food & drinks with confidence.

VERSATILE: This exquisite lunch bag is great for various occasions, including work, kindergarten, school, travel, picnics, outdoor activities, and storage. Suitable for kids, adults, teenage girls and boys, women, and men.

Cute Embroidery Patterns Multi-Use Inner Mesh Bag Adjustable Shoulder Strap High Quality Zippers The girls lunch bag is made of waterproof nylon and thick aluminum foil, and the encrypted pearl cotton can better maintain the temperature of food. Easy to clean and reusable. The insulated interior is easy to wipe clean with a damp cloth in case things get dirty on the go. Cute smiley face design, give you a good mood every day. The reusable lunch box has a handle and features a detachable and adjustable shoulder strap. There are two ways to carry it as a crossbody bag or stylish handbag.
